primary.$description: High-emphasis fills, texts, and icons against surface.

primary-container.$description: Color used as a fill in containers, on top of surface or background

on-primary-container.$description: Text and icons against primary container

inverse-primary.$description: Actionable elements, such as text buttons, against inverse primary

Accent.$description: Color for fills, texts, and icons. Used against surface or background. Indicates urgency.

Accent-container.$description: Color used as a fill in containers, on top of surface or background

on-Accent-container.$description: Text and icons against error container

background.$description: Default color used for the background canvas.

surface-dim.$description: A dimmed surface color in light and dark themes

surface-bright.$description: A bright surface color in light and dark themes

inverse-surface.$description: Background fills for elements which contrast against surface

on-surface.$description: Text and icons against any surface color

inverse-on-surface.$description: Text and icons against inverse surface

on-surface-variant.$description: Lower-emphasis color for text and icons against any surface color

on-surface-dim.$description: Lowest-emphasis color used for disabled text or icons that do not need to be seen.

outline.$description: Important boundaries, such as a text field outline

1.$description: Used on cards and some components

3.$description: Used on elements like modals or dialogs
